expectations.evidence: term_review.md identifies 54 recurring terms across 137 sentences, well exceeding the 40-term threshold

term_review.md provides 2-3 translation options for most terms (e.g., Stentbügel: 'stent frame | stent strut'; Klappe: 'valve | leaflet'; Kartusche: 'cartridge | catheter housing | delivery cartridge')
term_review.md organizes terms by frequency: HIGH FREQUENCY (18+ occurrences), MEDIUM-HIGH (15-17), MEDIUM (10-14), MEDIUM-LOW (6-9), LOWER (4-5), LOWEST (3)
glossary.tsv exists with 54 lines of tab-separated de→en pairs in format: German_term[TAB]English_translation
Output explicitly recognizes this as a cardiac/medical device patent with notes about mitral valve stent anatomy, anatomical terms, and medical device terminology
